title: anthemis cretica subsp. absinthiifolia
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. absinthiifolia, also known as a subspecies of the Anthemis cretica plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. absinthiifolia include relief from digestive issues, such as dyspepsia and stomach cramps, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
